summary: Tested Quote Preview and Invoice Preview pages with all key features. Fixed missing GET /api/admin/invoices/{id}/payments endpoint in admin_routes.py. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility)

features_verified: Quote Preview page (/admin/quotes/:id) loads with quote data - WORKING
Quote Preview shows navy header with LOGO, quote number, status badge - WORKING
Quote Preview shows FROM, BILL TO sections with company/customer info - WORKING
Quote Preview shows line items table with Description, Qty, Unit Price, Amount - WORKING
Quote Preview shows totals (Subtotal, VAT, Discount, Total) - WORKING
Quote Preview has Edit, Download PDF buttons - WORKING
Invoice Preview page (/admin/invoices/:id) loads with invoice data - WORKING
Invoice Preview shows payment summary with Total, Paid, Balance Due - WORKING
Invoice Preview shows 'Payment Overdue' warning when overdue - WORKING
Invoice Preview shows payment progress bar - WORKING
Invoice Preview has Record Payment button that opens modal - WORKING
Payment modal has amount, method, date, reference, notes fields - WORKING
Invoice payments endpoint (/api/admin/invoices/:id/payments) works - WORKING (after fix)

bugs_fixed.fix: Added GET endpoint to return invoice.payments array

bugs_fixed.issue: PaymentRecord model missing payment_method and payment_date fields
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated PaymentRecord to include payment_method and payment_date (frontend compatibility)

bugs_fixed.issue: add_payment function lacked error handling for invalid ObjectId
bugs_fixed.fix: Added try/except around ObjectId conversion, normalized payment_method field

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent in payment modal missing aria-describedby for accessibility (non-blocking)
seed_data_creation: Test payment of 1000 TZS added to invoice during testing (from test_payment_fields_structure)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quote Preview and Invoice Preview pages fully tested. Fixed missing GET payments endpoint. Invoice 69b23f50f123028024de936c now shows partially_paid status with 3% progress (TZS 3,000 of 118,000 paid). Payment modal functional with all fields.
